description:
🕒 10:30–15:30

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Ecotourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ohk-hannoalps3/

Recruitement for this tour has been closed due to organizer circumstances.

This four-part tour traverses the spine of the Hanno Alps, which runs from Izugadake to Tenranzan. Part 3 takes you from Agano Station over representative peaks including Maeita, Otakayama, and Tenkakyama. Lunch will be a special bento box from Taira Kurienen.

【Fee】7,800 yen per person (includes guide fee, lunch, and insurance)

【Capacity】 10 people

【Guide】 Akira Shimizu (JMGA-certified mountain guide, Stage II)

【What to bring】 Gloves, drinking water, hat, rain gear, snacks, towel
location: 集合 西武池袋線・秩父線「吾野駅」駅前広場
summary: ℹ️ Recruitment closed: Hanno Alps Full Traverse with Mountain Guide, Part 3 (Agano Station to Maeita, Otakayama, Tenkakyama, and on to Higashi-Agano Station)
